items.title: forex.com
items.author: vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com
items.snippet:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming stock trading, moving beyond traditional algorithmic approaches to enable more sophisticated, adaptive, and efficient strategies in 2026. This evolution is driven by advancements in machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), and the increasing availability of vast datasets. By 2025, AI is projected to handle almost 89% of the world's trading volume, with the AI trading market expected to reach $35 billion by 2030.

##
